spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Optical Alignment over Geometric

bottom_navigation.classes: fixed bottom-0 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/85 border-t border-[#E5EBE5] pb-safe z-50

scan_button.classes: bg-[#1C3F2A] text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-lg transform -translate-y-4

cards.classes: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-[#E5EBE5] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

pills.classes: bg-[#EEF2EB] text-[#1C3F2A] px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-medium

media.description: Illustration for empty plant collection or scanning hero
Illustration for healthy plant status or onboarding success
Mock image for a healthy Monstera plant in collection
Mock image for a scan result showing brown spots/disease

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast ratio. Text on dark green must be white. Dark text on bone white.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all buttons, tabs, links, forms, e.g., 'scan-camera-button', 'nav-reminders-tab', 'plant-card-monstera'

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first web app with a fixed bottom navigation bar (lucide-react icons: Scan, Library, Bell, History).
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for app layouts, and Shadcn UI for complex interactives (Dialog for scan results, Drawer/Sheet for plant details).
Never use Inter or Roboto. Install and use Cormorant Garamond for main headings (text-4xl to text-5xl tracking-tight) and Figtree for body and UI elements.
Implement generously spaced bento-style cards for the Plant Details view. Include big padded areas (p-6) to let content breathe.
The camera UI should simulate a viewfinder overlay. When scanned, slide up a bottom sheet with the AI identification result.
Use the provided image URLs as mock data for 'My Plants', 'Recent Scans', and Empty states.
Adhere strictly to the color palette: Bone White (#F9F8F6) background, Deep Forest Green (#1C3F2A) for primary elements, and Terracotta (#B85C38) for urgent reminders like 'Needs Water Now'.
CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
